author: .fjl
content:
Here is a draft of logic to disable the queue from the system contract. https://github.com/ethereum/sys-asm/pull/49. Adding this would give us the option to upgrade to another contract later, just in case. 

I know this kinda goes against my previous comment of not adding 'sleeper' functionality... But I do realize this facility is required for builder_deposits since people can lose a lot of money on it. We may at some point find ourselves in a situation where we want to disable deposits.
